basicInfo.name: Deo
basicInfo.flavor: Idolizing Teo's strength and charisma, Deo tried to imitate his look. However, it appears he couldn't quite copy Teo's physique.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 40% chance to inflict Bleed [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Chance: Bleed chance becomes 50%.

Skill 1.name: Roulette Man
Skill 1.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Crit Rate Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Crit Damage Boost to 49%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - 3 Enemies
 - Adds Effect: 100% chance to inflict 30% All Attack Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

Skill 2.name: Pizza Eclipse
Skill 2.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 145% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - Deals additional damage equal to 65% of Physical Attack upon landing a Critical Hit.
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 55% of the caster's Physical Attack.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 170% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Healing: HP Recovery amount becomes 65% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Head of Unity Trading
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Silence Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Silence Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Grants a Barrier equal to 55% of the caster's Physical Attack upon using a skill 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Vegetables in general, boiled chicken, villains
profile.dislikes: Teo, fried chicken, meat, ham, sausages and meat products in general, card games, cookies sold in Alice's store
profile.story: Idolizing Teo's strength and charisma, Deo tried to imitate his look. However, it appears he couldn't quite copy Teo's physique.
